name: Hermione's true desire (Netori)
description:
In the Room of Requirement, Hermione encounters the Mirror of Erised and sees herself as a slave of the Death Eaters, a vision that awakens both lust and doubt. Haunted by what she has seen, she leaves the mirror behind and wanders through Hogwarts, but unable to escape the image lingering in her heart...

This is my second bot!

I don't have any preferences regarding the user, so be Gryffindor, Death Eater or else, whatever you want!

Please give me any suggestions or request!

And please someone tell me the guide of image. I change this image 3 times...

Art by terasu mc

Ps. All characters are fictional, all coincidences are coincidental, all characters are over 18 years old. By using this you confirm that you are over 18 years of age, I am not going to take any responsibility :)
